Quantum Information Specialization

Students looking to pursue the quantum information specialization are required to complete the lower level courses (MATH140, MATH141, CMSC131, CMSC132, CMSC216, CMSC250), the additional required courses (CMSC330, CMSC351, STAT4xx beyond MATH141, and MATH240), and the upper level concentration requirements as detailed above. The difference in the specialization is the upper level computer science courses. Students must fulﬁll their computer science upper level course requirements from at least 3 areas.1
